# Fiozxr Rahman - Cybersecurity Portfolio

> Junior cybersecurity student from India specializing in penetration testing, encryption tools, and network reconnaissance.

## About

Fiozxr Rahman is a cybersecurity student building security tools for penetration testing, encryption, and vulnerability research. Based in India, focused on ethical hacking and security education.

## Projects

- [CryXR](https://github.com/fiozxr/CryXR): Multi-layered encryption and decryption tool with custom cipher stacking
- NetRecon (repo not yet public): LAN scanner for active hosts, open ports, and service fingerprinting
- WebVuln (repo not yet public): Proof-of-concept scanner for XSS, SQLi, and common misconfigurations

## Tech Stack

**Languages:** Python, Bash, C, SQL
**Security:** Kali Linux, Nmap, Metasploit, Burp Suite
**Cryptography:** AES, RSA, Custom Ciphers, Hash Functions
**Development:** Git, GitHub, VS Code, Docker
